gg.kalak.title: Kalak | كَلَك
gg.kalak.notes:
يسرّنا الإعلان عن الإطلاق الرسمي لتحديث متجر كلك، والذي يأتيكم بمزايا جديدة كليًا:

- شراء الفئات: أصبح بإمكانكم شراء الفئات وامتلاكها بشكل دائم دون الحاجة لاشتراك.

- التوسعات: بامكانكم شراء توسعة تشمل ١٠٠ سؤال اضافي لفئاتكم المفضلة لزيادة تنوع الاسئلة وتقليل التكرار!

- شخصيات جديدة: اختاروا من بين شخصيات مميزة تتيح لكم التعبير عن أنفسكم بأسلوبكم الخاص.

adventure.party.real.life.title: Sunday City: Life Simulator
adventure.party.real.life.notes:
Residents of Sunday City, we have great news! You can finally acquire your own apartment! Also, a new ship is arriving in the city, and there’s much more to come.
- Apartment: purchase your own living space, customize it and invite friends over.
- Trophies: show off special awards in your apartment.
- Meowpatra's Tales: a new ship has arrived at the pier, come check it out!
- Season Pass: complete quests, earn tons of rewards, and obtain unique skins.
- Businesses: 15 new businesses await you!

com.aim.racing.title: Extreme Car Driving Simulator
com.aim.racing.notes:
- Massive performance upgrades delivering a faster, smoother, and more responsive gameplay experience across the entire game.
-Added two brand-new vehicles with fresh ways to explore the city.
-Increased rewards across multiple game modes to make progression faster and more rewarding.

-Fixed multiple bugs and issues reported by the communit.
-Thank you for your support, feedback, and passion for the game!

- Please reach us at supportteam@bettergamesstudio.com.au for reporting any technical issues and suggestions, We hope that this update will improve performance and a good gaming experience for our community. Enjoy!
